summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all major requirements: version parsing, semantic versioning, changelog generation, commit parsing, and GitHub Actions integration. Well-organized with clear separation by concern and good use of fixtures. Tests include both happy paths and error scenarios (missing files, malformed versions, empty inputs). End-to-end and act-based workflow tests are thorough. Cleanup and isolation are proper. Minor gaps: missing some edge cases (file permissions, special characters in subjects, stdin input), no fixture validation before act runs, and act.test.ts is complex without additional documentation. Would reliably catch most regressions.
